title: Video Editor Lead Generation Engine
description: Finds potential video editing clients based on niche, location, and intent signals.

niche.title: Business Niche
niche.description: The type of business to target (e.g. 'Real Estate Agents', 'Fitness Coaches', 'Restaurants').

location.title: Target Location
location.description: City and country or state (e.g. 'Pune, India', 'Miami, FL', 'London, UK').

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of qualified leads to collect.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Defaults to residential proxy rotation if not specified.
